message: Yeah, I used to feel that way too. But the workshop made me realize it’s a big step up. The professors won’t slow down, and there’s way more independent work.
Not only will I have to memorize information for exams and complete assignments on my own, but I’m supposed to read stuff outside of class, like book chapters and articles.  I’m a slow reader.
Huh, I figured I could just keep doing what I’ve been doing.
That might work for some classes, but probably not for science or anything with a heavy workload. They said even smart students struggle if they don’t manage their time well.
